name: gameobject-create
title: GameObject / Create
description: Create a new GameObject in opened Prefab or in a Scene. If needed - provide proper 'position', 'rotation' and 'scale' to reduce amount of operations.

parameters.name: parentGameObjectRef
parameters.description: Parent GameObject reference. If not provided, the GameObject will be created at the root of the scene or prefab. Schema: {"name":"string"} or {"instanceID":int} or {"path":"hierarchy/path"}

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Transform position of the GameObject. Schema: {"x":0,"y":0,"z":0}

parameters.name: rotation
parameters.description: Transform rotation of the GameObject. Euler angles in degrees. Schema: {"x":0,"y":0,"z":0}

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Transform scale of the GameObject. Schema: {"x":1,"y":1,"z":1}

parameters.name: isLocalSpace
parameters.description: World or Local space of transform.

parameters.name: primitiveType
parameters.description: Values: [Cube, Sphere, Capsule, Cylinder, Plane, Quad]
